awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A list of awesome Symfony bundles, utilities and resources.
awesomeList.description: A list of awesome Symfony bundles, utilities and resources.

nodes.itemHTML: • Umbrella frameworkstars49 - Admin components and theme to create administration backends.
• KarserRecaptcha3Bundlestars57 - Integrates Google ReCAPTCHA v3 into Symfony.
• Symfony 5: The Fast Track - Book written by Symfony's creator, free online.
• AdminLTEBundlestars183 - Admin theme based on the AdminLTE Template
• Aimeos - Ultra fast PHP e-commerce framework for #gigacommerce
• Enqueuestars1.9k - Provides a common way for programs to create, send, read messages. Inspired by Java JMS
• Symfony 4.1 Jobeet Tutorial
• EightPointsGuzzleBundlestars408 - Integrates Guzzle 6.x, a PHP HTTP Client, into Symfony 2-4 and provides plugins to extend basic functionality.

• SerializedResponseBundlestars5 - A simple bundle to provide an easy way to send out json/xml/yaml responses of serialized objects with annotations.
• SRIORestUploadBundlestars45 - A symfony bundle to handle multiple upload ways on your REST API.
